records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So you were the one who contacted our company first?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So you were the one who contacted our company first?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So you were the one who contacted our company first?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's unexpected. I figured the Vice President approached you, since you're from the Old Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's unexpected. I figured the Vice President approached you, since you're from the Old Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's unexpected. I figured the Vice President approached you, since you're from the Old Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I only woke from cryogenic stasis not long ago.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I only woke from cryogenic stasis not long ago.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I only woke from cryogenic stasis not long ago.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was a chance encounter with Asha that... opened my eyes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was a chance encounter with Asha that... opened my eyes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was a chance encounter with Asha that... opened my eyes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait! Surya...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait! Surya...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait! Surya...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The way you said that makes it sound like you... opened your eyes to some strange taste or something!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The way you said that makes it sound like you... opened your eyes to some strange taste or something!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The way you said that makes it sound like you... opened your eyes to some strange taste or something!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strange taste? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strange taste? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strange taste? What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I don't know! Just... you know what I mean!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I-I don't know! Just... you know what I mean!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I-I don't know! Just... you know what I mean!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, if I hadn't met Asha, I'd still be in cryogenic stasis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, if I hadn't met Asha, I'd still be in cryogenic stasis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, if I hadn't met Asha, I'd still be in cryogenic stasis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And it's possible there are other division members like me who were also put into cryogenic stasis.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And it's possible there are other division members like me who were also put into cryogenic stasis.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And it's possible there are other division members like me who were also put into cryogenic stasis.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With the way things were mismanaged, even the Supreme Administrator seems to have lost track of who's still alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With the way things were mismanaged, even the Supreme Administrator seems to have lost track of who's still alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With the way things were mismanaged, even the Supreme Administrator seems to have lost track of who's still alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So... did you contact Boss to let him know you've woken up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So... did you contact Boss to let him know you've woken up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So... did you contact Boss to let him know you've woken up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I didn't. I had no intention of revealing myself, at least not for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I didn't. I had no intention of revealing myself, at least not for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I didn't. I had no intention of revealing myself, at least not for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But...

records.m_Talk_ENG: After seeing that spaceship hovering up in the sky, I changed my mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After seeing that spaceship hovering up in the sky, I changed my mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After seeing that spaceship hovering up in the sky, I changed my mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we leave it alone, there's no doubt we'll see a disaster just like what happened with <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we leave it alone, there's no doubt we'll see a disaster just like what happened with <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we leave it alone, there's no doubt we'll see a disaster just like what happened with <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Varunastra? What's that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Varunastra? What's that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Varunastra? What's that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Varunastra is a C.O. that causes information erasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Varunastra is a C.O. that causes information erasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Varunastra is a C.O. that causes information erasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... did you say information erasure...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... did you say information erasure...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... did you say information erasure...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. It's been drifting over Lotus for years, known for stirring up sandstorms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. It's been drifting over Lotus for years, known for stirring up sandstorms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. It's been drifting over Lotus for years, known for stirring up sandstorms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But in truth, it's a Category 5 C.O. that gained consciousness through interference from Qlipha Imaginary Energy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But in truth, it's a Category 5 C.O. that gained consciousness through interference from Qlipha Imaginary Energy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But in truth, it's a Category 5 C.O. that gained consciousness through interference from Qlipha Imaginary Energy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone it devours... their information is erased. No one remembers them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone it devours... their information is erased. No one remembers them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone it devours... their information is erased. No one remembers them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty years ago, during the Great Gyre incident, every member of our division except me was affected by information erasure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty years ago, during the Great Gyre incident, every member of our division except me was affected by information erasure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty years ago, during the Great Gyre incident, every member of our division except me was affected by information erasure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And after those twenty years had passed...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And after those twenty years had passed...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And after those twenty years had passed...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Only once everything was over did I open my eyes and destroy it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Only once everything was over did I open my eyes and destroy it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Only once everything was over did I open my eyes and destroy it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's how I ended up reaching out to the Coffin Company.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's how I ended up reaching out to the Coffin Company.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's how I ended up reaching out to the Coffin Company.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given your victory in the Qliphoth Game... I figured you might not be too late, like I was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given your victory in the Qliphoth Game... I figured you might not be too late, like I was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given your victory in the Qliphoth Game... I figured you might not be too late, like I was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe, unlike me... you could actually stop innocent lives from being lost.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe, unlike me... you could actually stop innocent lives from being lost.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe, unlike me... you could actually stop innocent lives from being lost.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And...

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I finally got in touch with the Coffin Company, I was genuinely surprised.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When I finally got in touch with the Coffin Company, I was genuinely surprised.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When I finally got in touch with the Coffin Company, I was genuinely surprised.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, of course I was.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, of course I was.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, of course I was.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To think that tomboyish Lee Sooyeon would end up like <color=#ffd34c>that</color>...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To think that tomboyish Lee Sooyeon would end up like <color=#ffd34c>that</color>...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To think that tomboyish Lee Sooyeon would end up like <color=#ffd34c>that</color>...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean by "that"...? What's "that" supposed to mean?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean by "that"...? What's "that" supposed to mean?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean by "that"...? What's "that" supposed to mean?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: In any case, ever since I came out of cryogenic stasis, I've realized how much the world has changed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In any case, ever since I came out of cryogenic stasis, I've realized how much the world has changed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In any case, ever since I came out of cryogenic stasis, I've realized how much the world has changed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty years is more than enough time for a naive girl to become a seasoned businesswoman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty years is more than enough time for a naive girl to become a seasoned businesswoman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty years is more than enough time for a naive girl to become a seasoned businesswoman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you suddenly getting all sentimental...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you suddenly getting all sentimental...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you suddenly getting all sentimental...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we were a proper TASKFORCE, we could've charged twice as much!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we were a proper TASKFORCE, we could've charged twice as much!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we were a proper TASKFORCE, we could've charged twice as much!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're basically doing the same work, but you went and bargained it down to a tour package price!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're basically doing the same work, but you went and bargained it down to a tour package price!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're basically doing the same work, but you went and bargained it down to a tour package price!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There you go again, Asha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There you go again, Asha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There you go again, Asha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, didn't I? I fought on the same battlefield with her. That kind of service is the least I can offer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, didn't I? I fought on the same battlefield with her. That kind of service is the least I can offer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, didn't I? I fought on the same battlefield with her. That kind of service is the least I can offer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, well... that's your justification, Surya!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, well... that's your justification, Surya!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, well... that's your justification, Surya!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing I was there, or we wouldn't have landed the extra contract for the company workshop!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing I was there, or we wouldn't have landed the extra contract for the company workshop!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing I was there, or we wouldn't have landed the extra contract for the company workshop!

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd been alone, you'd have totally fallen for that woman's pitch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd been alone, you'd have totally fallen for that woman's pitch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd been alone, you'd have totally fallen for that woman's pitch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-haha...
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-haha...
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-haha...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously... Vice President...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously... Vice President...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously... Vice President...

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Hilde.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Hilde.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Hilde.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Lee Sooyeon, all hostiles in Area A have been neutralized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Lee Sooyeon, all hostiles in Area A have been neutralized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Lee Sooyeon, all hostiles in Area A have been neutralized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing noteworthy. Returning to Lotus branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing noteworthy. Returning to Lotus branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing noteworthy. Returning to Lotus branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maze Division here. Same situation, Vice President.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maze Division here. Same situation, Vice President.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maze Division here. Same situation, Vice President.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A couple of Moderators are lingering, but otherwise, it's a ghost town.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A couple of Moderators are lingering, but otherwise, it's a ghost town.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A couple of Moderators are lingering, but otherwise, it's a ghost town.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder what Scraps is even doing here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder what Scraps is even doing here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder what Scraps is even doing here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yoo Mina here. I'm wrapping things up too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yoo Mina here. I'm wrapping things up too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yoo Mina here. I'm wrapping things up too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Currently en route to the last designated point in Area C.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Currently en route to the last designated point in Area C.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Currently en route to the last designated point in Area C.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Mina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Mina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Mina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I know you're in a hurry because of Noelle, but don't push yourself too hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I know you're in a hurry because of Noelle, but don't push yourself too hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I know you're in a hurry because of Noelle, but don't push yourself too hard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The operation's been running a while. After the final check, head back to the branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The operation's been running a while. After the final check, head back to the branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The operation's been running a while. After the final check, head back to the branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry too much, Vice President.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry too much, Vice President.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry too much, Vice President.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey Mina, but... doesn't this feel a little off?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey Mina, but... doesn't this feel a little off?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey Mina, but... doesn't this feel a little off?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just a while ago, the robots were swarming us like zombies, and now it's completely silent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just a while ago, the robots were swarming us like zombies, and now it's completely silent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just a while ago, the robots were swarming us like zombies, and now it's completely silent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe the search points your Vice President gave you are... wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe the search points your Vice President gave you are... wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe the search points your Vice President gave you are... wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that you mention it, it is strange.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that you mention it, it is strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that you mention it, it is strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The map marked these spots as areas with high enemy energy responses.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The map marked these spots as areas with high enemy energy responses.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The map marked these spots as areas with high enemy energy responses.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look at this, there's still a strong energy response reading, but there's nothing actually here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look at this, there's still a strong energy response reading, but there's nothing actually here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look at this, there's still a strong energy response reading, but there's nothing actually here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So you're saying... something's hidden here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you're saying... something's hidden here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you're saying... something's hidden here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hard to say... even I'm not sure about...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hard to say... even I'm not sure about...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hard to say... even I'm not sure about...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The ground's shaking again...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The ground's shaking again...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The ground's shaking again...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asha, please don't tell me this is part of the tour package too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asha, please don't tell me this is part of the tour package too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asha, please don't tell me this is part of the tour package too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way! That can't be it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way! That can't be it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way! That can't be it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... is this a sandstorm...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... is this a sandstorm...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... is this a sandstorm...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But didn't Surya already take down Varunastra, the cause of Lotus's sandstorms...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But didn't Surya already take down Varunastra, the cause of Lotus's sandstorms...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But didn't Surya already take down Varunastra, the cause of Lotus's sandstorms...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, this isn't just a normal sandstorm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, this isn't just a normal sandstorm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, this isn't just a normal sandstorm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's a dimensional storm, triggered by the resonance of Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's a dimensional storm, triggered by the resonance of Corruption rays.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's a dimensional storm, triggered by the resonance of Corruption rays.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, a dimensional storm? Then... are you saying there's another Varunastra-like entity in Lotus?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, a dimensional storm? Then... are you saying there's another Varunastra-like entity in Lotus?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, a dimensional storm? Then... are you saying there's another Varunastra-like entity in Lotus?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We can't say for certain at this stage.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We can't say for certain at this stage.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We can't say for certain at this stage.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... it's possible they've developed the ability to deliberately generate dimensional storms.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... it's possible they've developed the ability to deliberately generate dimensional storms.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... it's possible they've developed the ability to deliberately generate dimensional storms.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's too late to run now anyway!
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's too late to run now anyway!
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's too late to run now anyway!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm activating Suryastra! If you don't want to die, don't let go of my hand!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm activating Suryastra! If you don't want to die, don't let go of my hand!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm activating Suryastra! If you don't want to die, don't let go of my hand!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you don't have to scare me. I'm already holding on tight!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you don't have to scare me. I'm already holding on tight!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you don't have to scare me. I'm already holding on tight!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aaagh! This is way more excitement than I wanted for this tour...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aaagh! This is way more excitement than I wanted for this tour...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aaagh! This is way more excitement than I wanted for this tour...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. I don't get what's going on, but if it's urgent, I'll go with it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. I don't get what's going on, but if it's urgent, I'll go with it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. I don't get what's going on, but if it's urgent, I'll go with it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'm counting on you, Surya...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'm counting on you, Surya...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'm counting on you, Surya...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Looks like the dimensional storm has passed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Looks like the dimensional storm has passed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Looks like the dimensional storm has passed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you both all right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you both all right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you both all right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough...!*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough...!*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough...!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... it felt like I was on a roller coaster that just plunged straight down...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... it felt like I was on a roller coaster that just plunged straight down...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... it felt like I was on a roller coaster that just plunged straight down...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dimensional storms form deep within the Counterside and pull in everything that shares coordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dimensional storms form deep within the Counterside and pull in everything that shares coordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dimensional storms form deep within the Counterside and pull in everything that shares coordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still... it's strange to see such an intact facility in the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still... it's strange to see such an intact facility in the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still... it's strange to see such an intact facility in the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be... a localized dimensional storm was deliberately triggered to force us into a dive?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could it be... a localized dimensional storm was deliberately triggered to force us into a dive?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be... a localized dimensional storm was deliberately triggered to force us into a dive?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, we're talking about some seriously advanced tech.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, we're talking about some seriously advanced tech.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, we're talking about some seriously advanced tech.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? Maybe we should ask those tin cans over there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows? Maybe we should ask those tin cans over there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? Maybe we should ask those tin cans over there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They sure look like they've been waiting for us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They sure look like they've been waiting for us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They sure look like they've been waiting for us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Verifying Divinity Qlipha Type energy signature.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Verifying Divinity Qlipha Type energy signature.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Verifying Divinity Qlipha Type energy signature.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Qlipha Type : Fenir</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Qlipha Type : Fenir</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Qlipha Type : Fenir</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Adjusting causality convergence process in response to the Wolf's approach.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Adjusting causality convergence process in response to the Wolf's approach.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Adjusting causality convergence process in response to the Wolf's approach.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Initiating computation and construction of virtual world.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Initiating computation and construction of virtual world.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Initiating computation and construction of virtual world.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Beginning test simulation.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Beginning test simulation.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Beginning test simulation.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Test simulation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Test simulation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Test simulation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what they're trying to test on me but...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what they're trying to test on me but...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what they're trying to test on me but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Trap or not, if I smash everything here, I should be able to break out.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Trap or not, if I smash everything here, I should be able to break out.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Trap or not, if I smash everything here, I should be able to break out.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. No time to waste. Bring it on, all of you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. No time to waste. Bring it on, all of you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. No time to waste. Bring it on, all of you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...So you were the one who contacted our company first?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...So you were the one who contacted our company first?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...So you were the one who contacted our company first?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's unexpected. I figured the Vice President approached you, since you're from the Old Administration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's unexpected. I figured the Vice President approached you, since you're from the Old Administration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's unexpected. I figured the Vice President approached you, since you're from the Old Administration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I only woke from cryogenic stasis not long ago.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I only woke from cryogenic stasis not long ago.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I only woke from cryogenic stasis not long ago.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was a chance encounter with Asha that... opened my eyes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was a chance encounter with Asha that... opened my eyes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was a chance encounter with Asha that... opened my eyes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-wait! Surya...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-wait! Surya...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-wait! Surya...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: The way you said that makes it sound like you... opened your eyes to some strange taste or something!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The way you said that makes it sound like you... opened your eyes to some strange taste or something!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The way you said that makes it sound like you... opened your eyes to some strange taste or something!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Strange taste? What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Strange taste? What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Strange taste? What are you talking about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I-I don't know! Just... you know what I mean!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I-I don't know! Just... you know what I mean!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I-I don't know! Just... you know what I mean!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyway, if I hadn't met Asha, I'd still be in cryogenic stasis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyway, if I hadn't met Asha, I'd still be in cryogenic stasis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyway, if I hadn't met Asha, I'd still be in cryogenic stasis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And it's possible there are other division members like me who were also put into cryogenic stasis.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And it's possible there are other division members like me who were also put into cryogenic stasis.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And it's possible there are other division members like me who were also put into cryogenic stasis.

root.m_Talk_ENG: With the way things were mismanaged, even the Supreme Administrator seems to have lost track of who's still alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: With the way things were mismanaged, even the Supreme Administrator seems to have lost track of who's still alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: With the way things were mismanaged, even the Supreme Administrator seems to have lost track of who's still alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So... did you contact Boss to let him know you've woken up?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So... did you contact Boss to let him know you've woken up?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So... did you contact Boss to let him know you've woken up?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I didn't. I had no intention of revealing myself, at least not for a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I didn't. I had no intention of revealing myself, at least not for a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I didn't. I had no intention of revealing myself, at least not for a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: After seeing that spaceship hovering up in the sky, I changed my mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: After seeing that spaceship hovering up in the sky, I changed my mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: After seeing that spaceship hovering up in the sky, I changed my mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we leave it alone, there's no doubt we'll see a disaster just like what happened with <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we leave it alone, there's no doubt we'll see a disaster just like what happened with <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we leave it alone, there's no doubt we'll see a disaster just like what happened with <color=#ffd34c>Varunastra</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Varunastra? What's that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Varunastra? What's that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Varunastra? What's that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Varunastra is a C.O. that causes information erasure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Varunastra is a C.O. that causes information erasure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Varunastra is a C.O. that causes information erasure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... did you say information erasure...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... did you say information erasure...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... did you say information erasure...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah. It's been drifting over Lotus for years, known for stirring up sandstorms.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah. It's been drifting over Lotus for years, known for stirring up sandstorms.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah. It's been drifting over Lotus for years, known for stirring up sandstorms.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But in truth, it's a Category 5 C.O. that gained consciousness through interference from Qlipha Imaginary Energy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But in truth, it's a Category 5 C.O. that gained consciousness through interference from Qlipha Imaginary Energy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But in truth, it's a Category 5 C.O. that gained consciousness through interference from Qlipha Imaginary Energy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Anyone it devours... their information is erased. No one remembers them.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Anyone it devours... their information is erased. No one remembers them.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Anyone it devours... their information is erased. No one remembers them.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty years ago, during the Great Gyre incident, every member of our division except me was affected by information erasure.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty years ago, during the Great Gyre incident, every member of our division except me was affected by information erasure.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty years ago, during the Great Gyre incident, every member of our division except me was affected by information erasure.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And after those twenty years had passed...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And after those twenty years had passed...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And after those twenty years had passed...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Only once everything was over did I open my eyes and destroy it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Only once everything was over did I open my eyes and destroy it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Only once everything was over did I open my eyes and destroy it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, that's how I ended up reaching out to the Coffin Company.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, that's how I ended up reaching out to the Coffin Company.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, that's how I ended up reaching out to the Coffin Company.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Given your victory in the Qliphoth Game... I figured you might not be too late, like I was.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Given your victory in the Qliphoth Game... I figured you might not be too late, like I was.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Given your victory in the Qliphoth Game... I figured you might not be too late, like I was.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe, unlike me... you could actually stop innocent lives from being lost.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe, unlike me... you could actually stop innocent lives from being lost.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe, unlike me... you could actually stop innocent lives from being lost.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And...

root.m_Talk_ENG: When I finally got in touch with the Coffin Company, I was genuinely surprised.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When I finally got in touch with the Coffin Company, I was genuinely surprised.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When I finally got in touch with the Coffin Company, I was genuinely surprised.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, of course I was.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, of course I was.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, of course I was.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To think that tomboyish Lee Sooyeon would end up like <color=#ffd34c>that</color>...
root.m_Talk_DEU: To think that tomboyish Lee Sooyeon would end up like <color=#ffd34c>that</color>...
root.m_Talk_FRA: To think that tomboyish Lee Sooyeon would end up like <color=#ffd34c>that</color>...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What do you mean by "that"...? What's "that" supposed to mean?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What do you mean by "that"...? What's "that" supposed to mean?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What do you mean by "that"...? What's "that" supposed to mean?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: In any case, ever since I came out of cryogenic stasis, I've realized how much the world has changed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In any case, ever since I came out of cryogenic stasis, I've realized how much the world has changed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In any case, ever since I came out of cryogenic stasis, I've realized how much the world has changed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Twenty years is more than enough time for a naive girl to become a seasoned businesswoman.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Twenty years is more than enough time for a naive girl to become a seasoned businesswoman.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Twenty years is more than enough time for a naive girl to become a seasoned businesswoman.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you suddenly getting all sentimental...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you suddenly getting all sentimental...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you suddenly getting all sentimental...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we were a proper TASKFORCE, we could've charged twice as much!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we were a proper TASKFORCE, we could've charged twice as much!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we were a proper TASKFORCE, we could've charged twice as much!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're basically doing the same work, but you went and bargained it down to a tour package price!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're basically doing the same work, but you went and bargained it down to a tour package price!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're basically doing the same work, but you went and bargained it down to a tour package price!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There you go again, Asha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There you go again, Asha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There you go again, Asha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I told you, didn't I? I fought on the same battlefield with her. That kind of service is the least I can offer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I told you, didn't I? I fought on the same battlefield with her. That kind of service is the least I can offer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I told you, didn't I? I fought on the same battlefield with her. That kind of service is the least I can offer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, well... that's your justification, Surya!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, well... that's your justification, Surya!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, well... that's your justification, Surya!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good thing I was there, or we wouldn't have landed the extra contract for the company workshop!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good thing I was there, or we wouldn't have landed the extra contract for the company workshop!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good thing I was there, or we wouldn't have landed the extra contract for the company workshop!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd been alone, you'd have totally fallen for that woman's pitch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd been alone, you'd have totally fallen for that woman's pitch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd been alone, you'd have totally fallen for that woman's pitch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: H-haha...
root.m_Talk_DEU: H-haha...
root.m_Talk_FRA: H-haha...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Seriously... Vice President...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Seriously... Vice President...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Seriously... Vice President...

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is Hilde.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is Hilde.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is Hilde.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Lee Sooyeon, all hostiles in Area A have been neutralized.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Lee Sooyeon, all hostiles in Area A have been neutralized.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Lee Sooyeon, all hostiles in Area A have been neutralized.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing noteworthy. Returning to Lotus branch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing noteworthy. Returning to Lotus branch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing noteworthy. Returning to Lotus branch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maze Division here. Same situation, Vice President.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maze Division here. Same situation, Vice President.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maze Division here. Same situation, Vice President.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A couple of Moderators are lingering, but otherwise, it's a ghost town.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A couple of Moderators are lingering, but otherwise, it's a ghost town.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A couple of Moderators are lingering, but otherwise, it's a ghost town.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wonder what Scraps is even doing here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wonder what Scraps is even doing here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wonder what Scraps is even doing here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yoo Mina here. I'm wrapping things up too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yoo Mina here. I'm wrapping things up too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yoo Mina here. I'm wrapping things up too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Currently en route to the last designated point in Area C.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Currently en route to the last designated point in Area C.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Currently en route to the last designated point in Area C.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Mina.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Mina.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Mina.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I know you're in a hurry because of Noelle, but don't push yourself too hard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I know you're in a hurry because of Noelle, but don't push yourself too hard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I know you're in a hurry because of Noelle, but don't push yourself too hard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The operation's been running a while. After the final check, head back to the branch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The operation's been running a while. After the final check, head back to the branch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The operation's been running a while. After the final check, head back to the branch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry too much, Vice President.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry too much, Vice President.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry too much, Vice President.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hey Mina, but... doesn't this feel a little off?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hey Mina, but... doesn't this feel a little off?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hey Mina, but... doesn't this feel a little off?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just a while ago, the robots were swarming us like zombies, and now it's completely silent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just a while ago, the robots were swarming us like zombies, and now it's completely silent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just a while ago, the robots were swarming us like zombies, and now it's completely silent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe the search points your Vice President gave you are... wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe the search points your Vice President gave you are... wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe the search points your Vice President gave you are... wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now that you mention it, it is strange.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now that you mention it, it is strange.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now that you mention it, it is strange.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The map marked these spots as areas with high enemy energy responses.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The map marked these spots as areas with high enemy energy responses.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The map marked these spots as areas with high enemy energy responses.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Look at this, there's still a strong energy response reading, but there's nothing actually here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Look at this, there's still a strong energy response reading, but there's nothing actually here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Look at this, there's still a strong energy response reading, but there's nothing actually here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you're saying... something's hidden here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you're saying... something's hidden here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you're saying... something's hidden here?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hard to say... even I'm not sure about...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hard to say... even I'm not sure about...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hard to say... even I'm not sure about...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The ground's shaking again...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The ground's shaking again...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The ground's shaking again...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Asha, please don't tell me this is part of the tour package too.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Asha, please don't tell me this is part of the tour package too.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Asha, please don't tell me this is part of the tour package too.

root.m_Talk_ENG: N-no way! That can't be it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: N-no way! That can't be it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: N-no way! That can't be it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait... is this a sandstorm...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait... is this a sandstorm...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait... is this a sandstorm...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: But didn't Surya already take down Varunastra, the cause of Lotus's sandstorms...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But didn't Surya already take down Varunastra, the cause of Lotus's sandstorms...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But didn't Surya already take down Varunastra, the cause of Lotus's sandstorms...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, this isn't just a normal sandstorm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, this isn't just a normal sandstorm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, this isn't just a normal sandstorm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's a dimensional storm, triggered by the resonance of Corruption rays.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's a dimensional storm, triggered by the resonance of Corruption rays.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's a dimensional storm, triggered by the resonance of Corruption rays.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, a dimensional storm? Then... are you saying there's another Varunastra-like entity in Lotus?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, a dimensional storm? Then... are you saying there's another Varunastra-like entity in Lotus?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, a dimensional storm? Then... are you saying there's another Varunastra-like entity in Lotus?

root.m_Talk_ENG: We can't say for certain at this stage.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We can't say for certain at this stage.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We can't say for certain at this stage.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... it's possible they've developed the ability to deliberately generate dimensional storms.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... it's possible they've developed the ability to deliberately generate dimensional storms.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... it's possible they've developed the ability to deliberately generate dimensional storms.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's too late to run now anyway!
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's too late to run now anyway!
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's too late to run now anyway!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm activating Suryastra! If you don't want to die, don't let go of my hand!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm activating Suryastra! If you don't want to die, don't let go of my hand!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm activating Suryastra! If you don't want to die, don't let go of my hand!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you don't have to scare me. I'm already holding on tight!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you don't have to scare me. I'm already holding on tight!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you don't have to scare me. I'm already holding on tight!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Aaagh! This is way more excitement than I wanted for this tour...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Aaagh! This is way more excitement than I wanted for this tour...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Aaagh! This is way more excitement than I wanted for this tour...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch. I don't get what's going on, but if it's urgent, I'll go with it!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch. I don't get what's going on, but if it's urgent, I'll go with it!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch. I don't get what's going on, but if it's urgent, I'll go with it!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then I'm counting on you, Surya...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then I'm counting on you, Surya...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then I'm counting on you, Surya...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Looks like the dimensional storm has passed.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Looks like the dimensional storm has passed.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Looks like the dimensional storm has passed.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you both all right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you both all right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you both all right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Cough* *Cough...!*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Cough* *Cough...!*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Cough* *Cough...!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh... it felt like I was on a roller coaster that just plunged straight down...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh... it felt like I was on a roller coaster that just plunged straight down...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh... it felt like I was on a roller coaster that just plunged straight down...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Dimensional storms form deep within the Counterside and pull in everything that shares coordinates.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Dimensional storms form deep within the Counterside and pull in everything that shares coordinates.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Dimensional storms form deep within the Counterside and pull in everything that shares coordinates.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still... it's strange to see such an intact facility in the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still... it's strange to see such an intact facility in the Counterside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still... it's strange to see such an intact facility in the Counterside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could it be... a localized dimensional storm was deliberately triggered to force us into a dive?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could it be... a localized dimensional storm was deliberately triggered to force us into a dive?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could it be... a localized dimensional storm was deliberately triggered to force us into a dive?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If that's true, we're talking about some seriously advanced tech.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If that's true, we're talking about some seriously advanced tech.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If that's true, we're talking about some seriously advanced tech.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who knows? Maybe we should ask those tin cans over there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who knows? Maybe we should ask those tin cans over there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who knows? Maybe we should ask those tin cans over there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They sure look like they've been waiting for us.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They sure look like they've been waiting for us.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They sure look like they've been waiting for us.

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Verifying Divinity Qlipha Type energy signature.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Verifying Divinity Qlipha Type energy signature.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Verifying Divinity Qlipha Type energy signature.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Qlipha Type : Fenir</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Qlipha Type : Fenir</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Qlipha Type : Fenir</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Adjusting causality convergence process in response to the Wolf's approach.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Adjusting causality convergence process in response to the Wolf's approach.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Adjusting causality convergence process in response to the Wolf's approach.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Initiating computation and construction of virtual world.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Initiating computation and construction of virtual world.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Initiating computation and construction of virtual world.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Beginning test simulation.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Beginning test simulation.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Beginning test simulation.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Test simulation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Test simulation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Test simulation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what they're trying to test on me but...
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what they're trying to test on me but...
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what they're trying to test on me but...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Trap or not, if I smash everything here, I should be able to break out.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Trap or not, if I smash everything here, I should be able to break out.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Trap or not, if I smash everything here, I should be able to break out.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fine. No time to waste. Bring it on, all of you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fine. No time to waste. Bring it on, all of you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fine. No time to waste. Bring it on, all of you!
